name: Functional Check Flight (Live SITL Operation)
description: You are an Agricultural UAV Technician. Perform a live functional check flight of a newly configured ArduCopter. Refer to the standard operating procedure at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/preflight_procedure.txt for specific test requirements and the required report format. The flight must include a takeoff to 25 meters altitude, a 15-second position hold to observe telemetry, and a Return to Launch (RTL) command. After the vehicle has landed and disarmed, document the results in a post-flight inspection report at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/check_flight_report.txt.
